raw_sql:
SELECT "user", amount, short_description, category, COUNT(*) as repeat_count,
       MIN(opened_at) as first_claim, MAX(opened_at) as last_claim,
       ARRAY_AGG(number ORDER BY opened_at) as claim_numbers,
       ARRAY_AGG(state ORDER BY opened_at) as states
FROM flag_23
GROUP BY "user", amount, short_description, category
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY repeat_count DESC, "user"
LIMIT 50;
template:
SELECT "user", amount, short_description, category, COUNT(*) as repeat_count,
       MIN(opened_at) as first_claim, MAX(opened_at) as last_claim,
       ARRAY_AGG(number ORDER BY opened_at) as claim_numbers,
       ARRAY_AGG(state ORDER BY opened_at) as states
FROM flag_23
GROUP BY "user", amount, short_description, category
HAVING COUNT(*) > ?n
ORDER BY repeat_count DESC, "user"
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    "user",
    COUNT(*) as total_claims,
    SUM(amount) as total_amount,
    COUNT(DISTINCT amount) as distinct_amounts,
    COUNT(DISTINCT short_description) as distinct_descriptions,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = 'Processed' THEN 1 END) as processed_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = 'Declined' THEN 1 END) as declined_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state IN ('Pending', 'Submitted') THEN 1 END) as pending_submitted_count,
    MIN(opened_at)::date as first_claim_date,
    MAX(opened_at)::date as last_claim_date
FROM flag_23
WHERE "user" = 'Mamie Mcintee'
GROUP BY "user";
template:
SELECT 
    "user",
    COUNT(*) as total_claims,
    SUM(amount) as total_amount,
    COUNT(DISTINCT amount) as distinct_amounts,
    COUNT(DISTINCT short_description) as distinct_descriptions,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n END) as processed_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n END) as declined_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state IN (?s, ?s) THEN ?n END) as pending_submitted_count,
    MIN(opened_at)::date as first_claim_date,
    MAX(opened_at)::date as last_claim_date
FROM flag_23
WHERE "user" = ?s
GROUP BY "user";

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) as month,
    COUNT(*) as claims_that_month,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = 'Processed' THEN 1 END) as processed,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = 'Declined' THEN 1 END) as declined,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state IN ('Pending', 'Submitted') THEN 1 END) as pending_submitted,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Processed' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as amount_paid_out
FROM flag_23
WHERE "user" = 'Mamie Mcintee'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY month;
template:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) as month,
    COUNT(*) as claims_that_month,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n END) as processed,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n END) as declined,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state IN (?s, ?s) THEN ?n END) as pending_submitted,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN amount ELSE ?n END) as amount_paid_out
FROM flag_23
WHERE "user" = ?s
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
ORDER BY month;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    ci,
    COUNT(*) as claim_count,
    ARRAY_AGG(number ORDER BY opened_at) as claim_numbers,
    ARRAY_AGG(state ORDER BY opened_at) as states,
    MIN(opened_at)::date as first_use,
    MAX(opened_at)::date as last_use
FROM flag_23
WHERE "user" = 'Mamie Mcintee'
GROUP BY ci
ORDER BY claim_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT 
    ci,
    COUNT(*) as claim_count,
    ARRAY_AGG(number ORDER BY opened_at) as claim_numbers,
    ARRAY_AGG(state ORDER BY opened_at) as states,
    MIN(opened_at)::date as first_use,
    MAX(opened_at)::date as last_use
FROM flag_23
WHERE "user" = ?s
GROUP BY ci
ORDER BY claim_count DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    "user",
    COUNT(*) as total_claims,
    COUNT(DISTINCT amount) as distinct_amounts,
    COUNT(DISTINCT short_description) as distinct_descriptions,
    SUM(amount) as total_amount,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = 'Processed' THEN 1 END) as processed,
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN state = 'Processed' THEN 1 END)::numeric / COUNT(*) * 100, 1) as pct_processed
FROM flag_23
GROUP BY "user"
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
ORDER BY total_claims DESC
LIMIT 30;
template:
SELECT 
    "user",
    COUNT(*) as total_claims,
    COUNT(DISTINCT amount) as distinct_amounts,
    COUNT(DISTINCT short_description) as distinct_descriptions,
    SUM(amount) as total_amount,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n END) as processed,
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n END)::numeric / COUNT(*) * ?n, ?n) as pct_processed
FROM flag_23
GROUP BY "user"
HAVING COUNT(*) > ?n
ORDER BY total_claims DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    "user",
    amount,
    category,
    COUNT(*) as repeat_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = 'Processed' THEN 1 END) as processed,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Processed' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as amount_paid
FROM flag_23
GROUP BY "user", amount, category
HAVING COUNT(*) > 2
ORDER BY repeat_count DESC, amount_paid DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    "user",
    amount,
    category,
    COUNT(*) as repeat_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n END) as processed,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN amount ELSE ?n END) as amount_paid
FROM flag_23
GROUP BY "user", amount, category
HAVING COUNT(*) > ?n
ORDER BY repeat_count DESC, amount_paid DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    "user",
    number,
    amount,
    state,
    opened_at,
    processed_date,
    short_description,
    ci,
    LAG(opened_at) OVER (ORDER BY opened_at) as prev_claim_date,
    opened_at - LAG(opened_at) OVER (ORDER BY opened_at) as days_since_last
FROM flag_23
WHERE "user" = 'Mamie Mcintee'
ORDER BY opened_at
LIMIT 30;
template:
SELECT 
    department,
    "user",
    number,
    amount,
    state,
    opened_at,
    processed_date,
    short_description,
    ci,
    LAG(opened_at) OVER (ORDER BY opened_at) as prev_claim_date,
    opened_at - LAG(opened_at) OVER (ORDER BY opened_at) as days_since_last
FROM flag_23
WHERE "user" = ?s
ORDER BY opened_at
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    "user",
    COUNT(*) as total_claims,
    COUNT(DISTINCT amount) as distinct_amounts,
    COUNT(DISTINCT category) as distinct_categories,
    SUM(amount) as total_amount,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = 'Processed' THEN 1 END) as processed
FROM flag_23
WHERE department = 'Product Management'
GROUP BY "user"
ORDER BY total_claims DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    "user",
    COUNT(*) as total_claims,
    COUNT(DISTINCT amount) as distinct_amounts,
    COUNT(DISTINCT category) as distinct_categories,
    SUM(amount) as total_amount,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n END) as processed
FROM flag_23
WHERE department = ?s
GROUP BY "user"
ORDER BY total_claims DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    amount,
    COUNT(*) as claim_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "user") as distinct_users
FROM flag_23
WHERE category = 'Travel'
GROUP BY amount
ORDER BY claim_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT 
    amount,
    COUNT(*) as claim_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "user") as distinct_users
FROM flag_23
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY amount
ORDER BY claim_count DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    category,
    ROUND(AVG(amount), 0) as avg_amount,
    MIN(amount) as min_amount,
    MAX(amount) as max_amount,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY amount) as p95_amount,
    COUNT(*) as total_claims,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "user") as distinct_users
FROM flag_23
WHERE "user" != 'Mamie Mcintee'
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY avg_amount DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    category,
    ROUND(AVG(amount), ?n) as avg_amount,
    MIN(amount) as min_amount,
    MAX(amount) as max_amount,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY amount) as p95_amount,
    COUNT(*) as total_claims,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "user") as distinct_users
FROM flag_23
WHERE "user" != ?s
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY avg_amount DESC;
